headline: 1 Profitable Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Question
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.

raw.headline: 1 Profitable Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Question

headline: Strength in Commercial Engines Unit Drives GE Aerospace: A Sign for More Upside?
summary: GE's Commercial Engines unit saw orders jump 93% to $17.3B as engine demand surged, while major investments aim to support future growth.

raw.headline: Strength in Commercial Engines Unit Drives GE Aerospace: A Sign for More Upside?
